description: Summary generation and retrieval: inject a session summary and verify its content and metadata

operations.author: assistant
operations.text: Sure, what kind of project are you planning?

operations.author: user
operations.text: A web application for task management with real-time collaboration.

operations.author: assistant
operations.text: That sounds ambitious. We should use React for the frontend and WebSocket for real-time features.

operations.author: user
operations.text: Agreed. Let's also add file sharing capabilities.

operations.author: assistant
operations.text: Good idea. We can integrate cloud storage APIs for that.

operations.summary_text: The user and assistant are planning a task management web application. Key decisions: use React frontend, WebSocket for real-time collaboration, and integrate cloud storage APIs for file sharing.
